'''Arthur G. Insana''' directed and produced the [[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition|''Dark Empire'' audio dramas]]<ref name="Dark Empire dramas">[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition|''Dark Empire'' audio dramas]]</ref> and the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio drama)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]].<ref name="TotJ Dark Lords" />
